description_long: This is a large, rectangular commercial building with a flat, gray roof and a prominent orange and white facade. The front features a wide entrance with multiple glass doors and large signage reading 'LOJAS CEM', accompanied by a blue and white mascot graphic and a circular guarantee logo. The side and rear walls are mostly solid, with a few small windows and a secondary block-like extension at the back. The building is elevated on white columns, creating a sheltered area beneath the main structure, and several orange bike racks or barriers are visible near the entrance. The overall appearance is utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on branding and accessibility.
description: A large, boxy car store with a flat roof, orange and white branding, and a wide glass entrance supported by columns. Prominent signage and minimal windows define its commercial, utilitarian style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with glass doors, large 'LOJAS CEM' signage, mascot graphic, and guarantee logo above the sheltered area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, orange-brick facade, secondary signage, and multiple supporting columns beneath the building.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, windowless wall with a blocky extension, lacking signage or decorative features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with additional branding, a guarantee logo, and a small poster, as well as a partial view of the entrance area.
attribute_signage: Large painted and printed signage above the main entrance and on the side facades, including 'LOJAS CEM' text, a mascot graphic, and a circular guarantee logo. Signage is non-illuminated and prominently placed on the upper facade.
attribute_glass_facade: Partial glass facade at the main entrance with large glass doors and windows; no full-height glass panels or curtain walls.
attribute_architectural_style: modern utilitarian with minimal decorative elements and a focus on branding
